title: Gpier
compiled_truth: Gpier is an external contact at [Doubleclick](companies/doubleclick). Over the corpus period (1999-04-26 to 2000-02-16), Gpier sent 6 and received 42 emails, totalling 48 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (6), [Bhutt](people/bhutt-ankarcapital) (4).
timeline:
